posts.text: The US blockade will close off Iranian waters in the Gulf of Oman and in the Arabian Sea, east of the Strait of Hormuz, and the restrictions won’t be limited to ports and oil terminals, according to a note issued by US forces in the region and seen by Bloomberg.
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text:
The chatter-industrial complex may still be in its infancy. Yet it has already yielded results ranging from the brilliantly informative to the strikingly odd  http://econ.st/4sw8gbh

posts.text:
BREAKING: Israel’s Prime Minister Netanyahu says the ceasefire with Iran “could end quickly.”

President Trump’s “blockade” of the Strait of Hormuz begins in under 3 hours.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: I've become a bit obsessed with the interconnectedness of graphene to nearly everything.  Not just the material world but I'm constantly reminded how information flows, communication occurs and how we humans organize / socialize. I'm loving the "graphene vibe" :)
posts.author: BambroughKevin
